blocks.text: thought about Nadia going upstairs before dinner to freshen up. He let the thought settle without saying it.

blocks.speaker: Dean Ashby
blocks.content: Are they saying it was — are they saying someone did this?

blocks.speaker: Julian Crane
blocks.content: Suspicious death. That's all they've confirmed.

blocks.speaker: Dean Ashby
blocks.content: We were all right there. We were in the same house.

blocks.speaker: Dean Ashby
blocks.content: If someone did this — someone we know —

blocks.speaker: Julian Crane
blocks.content: Try not to think too far ahead yet. Let the investigation run.

blocks.speaker: Dean Ashby
blocks.content: Easy for you to say. You didn't know him.
That was true. And it was also the thing that let me see clearly.

blocks.speaker: Dean Ashby
blocks.content: He was the best of us. I mean that literally. Not just — he was actually the best person I've known.

blocks.speaker: Dean Ashby
blocks.content: Find out what happened to him. I don't care how. Just find out.

blocks.prompt: Dean just asked Julian directly. Does Julian make a commitment?

options.label: "I'll do what I can." That's more honest.
